title: PreAuthRecord
description: Canonical pre-authorization record. Represents the full lifecycle of a pre-authorization from Odoo POS request through FCC authorization to dispense completion. Spec: docs/specs/data-models/tier-1-1-pre-auth-record-spec.md

siteCode.description: Site identifier. Part of dedup key with odooOrderId.

odooOrderId.description: Odoo POS order reference. Part of dedup key with siteCode.

productCode.description: Canonical fuel product code (e.g., PMS, AGO, IK, DPK).

requestedAmount.description: Authorized amount in integer minor units (cents). Always > 0. Pre-auth is always by amount, never by volume.

unitPrice.description: Price per litre at time of authorization, in minor units per litre. Informational only; FCC authorizes by amount.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., ZAR, KES, TZS).

vehicleNumber.description: Vehicle registration plate, if captured. Optional.

customerTaxId.description: Customer Tax Identification Number (TIN). PII — NEVER log. Required when requireCustomerTaxId=true.

customerBusinessName.description: B2B business name. Required for B2B fiscalized transactions.

attendantId.description: Odoo user ID of the fuel attendant. Optional.

fccCorrelationId.description: FCC-assigned correlation reference returned at authorization time. Used as primary key for dispense-to-preauth matching. Null if vendor does not provide.

fccAuthorizationCode.description: FCC authorization confirmation code. Vendor-specific. Null until AUTHORIZED state.

matchedFccTransactionId.description: fccTransactionId of the final dispense transaction matched by the reconciliation engine. Null until COMPLETED state.

actualAmount.description: Actual dispensed amount in integer minor units. Populated at COMPLETED. Null until then.

actualVolume.description: Actual dispensed volume in integer millilitres (1 litre = 1000). Populated at COMPLETED. Null until then. Divide by 1000 for litres display.

amountVariance.description: actualAmount - requestedAmount in minor units. Negative = under-dispense. Populated at COMPLETED (cloud only). Null on Edge Agent.

varianceBps.description: ABS(amountVariance) / requestedAmount * 10000, rounded. Units: basis points (1 bps = 0.01%). Populated at COMPLETED (cloud only). Compare against site tolerance.

status.description: Current pre-authorization lifecycle state. Terminal states: COMPLETED, CANCELLED, EXPIRED, FAILED.

createdAt.description: Record creation timestamp in UTC ISO 8601.

requestedAt.description: When Odoo POS submitted the pre-auth request to the Edge Agent. UTC ISO 8601.

expiresAt.description: requestedAt + preAuthTimeoutMinutes. Stored at creation. Used by expiry worker. UTC ISO 8601.

authorizedAt.description: When FCC returned authorization confirmation. Null until AUTHORIZED state. UTC ISO 8601.

dispensingAt.description: When FCC signalled dispense started. Null if vendor does not report DISPENSING state. UTC ISO 8601.

completedAt.description: When reconciliation engine matched the final dispense. Null until COMPLETED state. UTC ISO 8601.

cancelledAt.description: When cancellation was processed. Null unless CANCELLED. UTC ISO 8601.

expiredAt.description: When expiry worker transitioned the record. Null unless EXPIRED. UTC ISO 8601.

failedAt.description: When FCC rejection was processed. Null unless FAILED. UTC ISO 8601.

updatedAt.description: Last modification timestamp. Updated on every state transition. UTC ISO 8601.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version for forward compatibility. Current value: 1.

preAuthStatusEnum.description: PreAuthStatus: COMPLETED, CANCELLED, EXPIRED, FAILED are terminal states.
